CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR);
EXPORT DATABASE 'target_directory' (FORMAT parquet, COMPRESSION zstd, ROW_GROUP_SIZE 100_000);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id > 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
EXPORT DATABASE 'target_directory' (FORMAT parquet, COMPRESSION zstd, ROW_GROUP_SIZE 50_000);
SELECT * FROM test_table INNER JOIN another_table ON test_table.id = another_table.id;
CREATE TABLE third_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO third_table SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
EXPORT DATABASE 'target_directory' (FORMAT parquet, COMPRESSION zstd, ROW_GROUP_SIZE 1);
CREATE TABLE large_table (id INTEGER, data VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO large_table SELECT i, 'data ' || i FROM range(1, 1000000) AS i;
